name: suite-manager
description: Shared control-plane service for onboarding, health checks, and future suite automation.

scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path='../../scripts/sync-branding.cjs'; if (fs.existsSync(path)) require(path);"
scripts.prebuild:client: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path='../../scripts/sync-branding.cjs'; if (fs.existsSync(path)) require(path);"
scripts.predev:client: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path='../../scripts/sync-branding.cjs'; if (fs.existsSync(path)) require(path);"
